DP.433.0000:
Backlot: Hello, hello!
Welcome to my opulent mansion!\f
There’s a lot for me to be proud of
inside, and outside, of this home...\f
But what makes me the most proud is
my trophy garden in the back!\f
Why bother traveling afar when
Pokémon are attracted by my garden?\f
They come to me in hopes of seeing
the garden!\f
You’re welcome to join them and
marvel at my garden!
DP.433.0003:
Backlot: Er-hem!\f
There’s a lot for me to be proud of
inside, and outside, of this home...\f
But what makes me the most proud is
my trophy garden in the back!\f
Why bother traveling afar when
Pokémon are attracted by my garden?\f
They come to me in hopes of seeing
the garden!\f
Well, doesn’t that make you envious?
You are envious, yes?
DP.433.0004:
I know you’re really envious...
You’re not fooling anyone...
DP.433.0005:
Backlot: Muhohoho... I bet you are!
I knew you would be!\f
But I don’t mind! I enjoy sharing
my stories with you!\f
So! When I go out into my prized
garden, Pokémon come running to me.\f
They sidle up, as happy as they can
be to see me!\f
Well? Doesn’t that make you envious?
You are envious, yes?
DP.433.0006:
Backlot: Muhohoho... I bet you are!
I knew you would be!\f
But I don’t mind! I enjoy sharing
my stories with you!\f
So! This is what happened this morning
when I went into my trophy garden.\f
I noticed a cute-eyed [0100,0000],
which joyously ran over to me.\f
The [0100,0000] ran up and gave me
a smooch on my cheek...\f
DP.433.0007:
Butler: M-Master!
Th-that Pokémon you mentioned...\r
It doesn’t exist in the garden...\f
DP.433.0008:
Backlot: Wha...\f
Erm...\f
Wh-what are you saying?
I’m no blowhard!\f
Listen... Mutter, mutter...
Whisper, whisper...\f
DP.433.0009:
Butler: Yes, Master!
Right away, sir!\f
DP.433.0010:
Backlot: ...It’s true, I tell you!
No lies ever leave these lips!\f
There really are cute [0100,0000]
in my trophy garden! Honest truth!
DP.433.0011:
Butler: Master is a truly wonderful
and generous person!\f
It’s on his orders that the garden,
his pride and joy, is open to all,\r
even Trainers.
DP.433.0012:
Butler: Master actually quite enjoys
showing his prized garden to strong\r
Trainers.
DP.433.0013:
Butler: Master took a stroll in his
trophy garden today, like usual.
DP.433.0014:
Butler: Did you see them? There were
some [0100,0000], weren’t there?\f
But that’s only to be expected.
It’s Master’s trophy garden.
DP.433.0015:
Butler: How do you find it? Master’s
upgraded trophy garden, I mean.\f
You did notice the influx of quite
rare Pokémon, yes?\f
But that’s only to be expected.
It’s Master’s trophy garden.
DP.433.0016:
You may look, but please refrain from
touching this Pokémon statue.
DP.433.0017:
I’m very sorry. But please refrain
from touching this statue.\f
DP.433.0018:
It’s a very expensive-looking Pokémon
statue...\f
...!
You got fingerprints on it...
DP.433.0019:
It’s a very expensive-looking book
on Pokémon.
